hero.headline: Hicham Alaoui - EQD Trading Analyst, Data Scientist, and AI Systems Builder
hero.subline: I design data products and decision systems for trading operations, quantitative finance, and applied AI.

bullets: Design and maintain index workflow operations across Inputs, Run, and Outputs.
Drive production controls, monitoring logic, and escalation visibility for trading operations.
Standardize traceability and output quality checks for recurring rebalancing cycles.
Built risk analytics tooling for trading controls and dynamic monitoring.
Developed reproducible data pipelines and dashboard layers for exception analysis.
Packaged workflows for operational continuity using containerized deployment.
Modeled agricultural emissions and scenario behavior using ML and econometric methods.
Developed applied AI components for sustainability content and analytics workflows.

projects.name: Production-Control Platform for Index Rebalancing Workflows
projects.problem: Index rebalancing workflows rely on sensitive inputs, rule-driven runs, and output checks; manual controls create operational risk and weak traceability.
projects.approach: Designed an internal platform structured as Inputs -> Run -> Outputs, with input validation, run logging, standardized dumps, mismatch detection, and KPI/KPA monitoring.

projects.name: AI Investment System for Equity Selection and Portfolio Allocation
projects.problem: Turning large volumes of market and issuer data into consistent portfolio decisions is slow and noisy.
projects.approach: Designed an AI-driven workflow combining research signals, issuer scoring, ranking, and portfolio-weighting logic into an execution-ready decision pipeline.

projects.name: Risk Analytics for Trading Controls and Limit Monitoring
projects.problem: Trading-control environments need fast visibility on threshold breaches, exceptions, and recurring issues.
projects.approach: Built analytics logic and monitoring views to structure control signals, exception tracking, and escalation-oriented reporting.

projects.name: Tick-Movement Prediction with Machine Learning
projects.problem: Predict short-term market movement from trade-signal features on continuous derivatives contracts.
projects.approach: Built an XGBoost-based time-series workflow with train/validation/test structure and regression-based evaluation.

projects.name: Credit Card Fraud Detection with Imbalanced Learning
projects.problem: Fraud datasets are highly imbalanced, making naive classification unreliable.
projects.approach: Compared multiple classifiers and handled class imbalance with oversampling to improve fraud detection performance.

projects.name: Modeling Agricultural CO2 Emissions in Switzerland
projects.problem: Agricultural emissions are driven by multiple structural and environmental factors that are difficult to model jointly.
projects.approach: Built predictive models using agricultural, demographic, and climate-related features to analyze emission dynamics.

projects.name: SkyFarms / FarmVision
projects.problem: Early crop stress detection is difficult in high-variability growth environments.
projects.approach: Prototyped practical diagnostics workflows combining data capture and model inference for operations.

projects.name: Prompt-to-Pipeline ETL Generator
projects.problem: Building repetitive ETL scaffolding slows experimentation and delivery.
projects.approach: Designed a prompt-driven generator that creates standardized ETL skeletons and validation steps.

about.narrative: EQD Trading Analyst and Data Scientist with experience in quantitative finance, analytics products, and AI systems design. I build production-oriented workflows for trading operations, risk visibility, and decision support.
